wayfinder

wayfinder

/weɪfaɪndər/

/ˈweɪˌfaɪndər/

[way-fy-nder]

UK /weɪˈfaɪndə/

US /ˈweɪˌfaɪndɚ/

regional /ˈweɪˌfaɪndər/

A person who finds or follows a route through unfamiliar country.

A guide or instrument used to determine a safe direction.

A tool that helps travelers identify a path toward a destination.

A person who leads others through a difficult journey.

A device that indicates position and direction while moving.

Something that reveals a route hidden by distance or obstruction.

A method for choosing among several possible courses.

An aid used by explorers to maintain a planned course.

Word of the Day Cite this entry
